top_signals.title: China Tech ETF Sees Record Inflow Despite Global Chip Selloff
top_signals.summary: Chinese investors poured a record amount into an exchange-traded fund focusing on communication devices on Friday despite a global semiconductor selloff, underscoring resilient demand for the country’s hardware stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Hostilities halted again as peace talks continue
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran agree to pause fresh hostilities, sending futures higher. But concerns over the peace talks continue, pushing oil back above $70 a barrel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Verizon, BT Are Said to Near JV Deal for International Business
top_signals.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is in advanced talks to combine some of its international business with that of the UK’s BT Group Plc, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
